policy_summary: H100 launch is a strict user-approval STOP gate; never auto-launch H100 workloads (launch_policy: needs_user_approval, auto_dispatch_allowed: false, ~$1-1.5k/run cost discipline)

gate_logic_lines.dry_run_terminus: 169-192 (dry-run emits planned cmds, exits 0 without launching)

abort_reason: pre-flight 3/6 FAIL: stage2_verdict=NOT_READY (expected READY); script terminates at line 164 before any pod-create call. Additionally, default MODE=dry-run would never reach runpodctl create even if pre-flight passed, and --apply path further requires --yes-i-mean-it (exit 3).

stop_policy_layers_verified: L1: default mode = dry-run (no --apply means no launch)
L2: pre-flight FAIL_N>0 hard-aborts with exit 1 before any runpodctl create
no_pods_launched_confirmation: runpodctl create pod was NOT invoked; only planned-command logging would occur in dry-run path, which itself was not reached due to pre-flight FAIL
